data.content:
Microsoft SDE-1 Interview Pattern:

Format: 4 Rounds (3 Technical + 1 AA/Hiring Manager)

Round Breakdown:
- Round 1-2: Coding (Leetcode Medium, focus on arrays, strings, trees)
- Round 3: System Design light + Coding
- Round 4: As Appropriate (AA) - behavioral + culture fit

Key Focus Areas:
- Clean code with proper edge case handling
- Object-Oriented Design
- Problem-solving approach matters more than optimal solution
- Growth mindset and collaboration

Common Questions:
- LRU Cache
- Binary tree problems (serialize/deserialize, lowest common ancestor)
- String manipulation
- Basic system design: URL shortener, key-value store

Behavioral (Growth Mindset):
- Tell me about a time you received tough feedback
- How do you learn from failures?
- Describe a time you helped a teammate grow
- How do you handle disagreements in code reviews?

Tips:
- Microsoft values growth mindset — show you learn from mistakes
- Write clean, production-quality code on whiteboard
- Ask clarifying questions before coding
- CTC range: 20-30 LPA for SDE-1 (India)
- Teams culture: collaboration > individual brilliance

Microsoft SDE-2 Interview Pattern:

Format: 4-5 Rounds (2 Coding + 1 System Design + 1 Design + 1 AA)

System Design:
- Design Teams messaging system
- Design OneDrive file sync
- Design Azure notification service
- Design a distributed cache

Expectations beyond SDE-1:
- Drive technical decisions independently
- Mentor junior engineers
- Cross-team collaboration experience
- Deep expertise in one domain

CTC range: 35-55 LPA for SDE-2
